rationale.R1.1: Delegation could be asking for a read of the contribution claim and framing of the self-recognition protocol; the artifact does assert a novel protocol and correlation finding that would need to be reconstructed and evaluated.
rationale.R1.2: Delegation could be asking whether the methodology is internally sound—e.g., whether controlling for position bias is sufficient, whether the chance baseline of 0.50 is correctly motivated, or whether the correlation inference follows from the design.
